name: @graphorin/benchmark-cost
description: Prompt-assembly token-cost regression suite for the Graphorin framework. Drives a real createAgent(...) turn through an offline capturing provider and counts the tokens of the ASSEMBLED ProviderRequest (system prompt + instructions + advertised tool schemas + transcript) per scenario, asserting < 10 % growth against a stored baseline - so a regression in prompt assembly (longer system prompt, fatter tool descriptions) is caught. Nominal USD from the bundled @graphorin/pricing snapshot. Created and maintained by Oleksiy Stepurenko.
author: Oleksiy Stepurenko
